Situated in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]], the '''Obligon Nebula''' was close to [[Arrissa's Field]], and often used by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] for cover as they launched attacks on passing [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
